name: PdeRecRptSubmtCntrCntrDtlFLoad

text.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT PDE_REC_RPT_SUBMT_CNTR_CNTR_DTL_SK, FILE_ID, SUBMT_CNTR_SEQ_ID, CNTR_SEQ_ID, DTL_SEQ_ID, SRC_SYS_CD, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, PDE_REC_RPT_SUBMT_CNTR_CNTR_SK, SUBMT_CMS_CNTR_ID, CMS_CNTR_ID, CUR_MCARE_BNFCRY_ID, LAST_SUBMT_MCARE_BNFCRY_ID, LAST_SUBMT_CARDHLDR_ID, DRUG_COV_STTUS_CD_TX, CUR_MO_GROS_DRUG_CST_ABOVE_AMT/100 AS CUR_MO_GROS_DRUG_CST_ABOVE_AMT, CUR_MO_GROS_DRUG_CST_BELOW_AMT/100 AS CUR_MO_GROS_DRUG_CST_BELOW_AMT, CUR_MO_TOT_GROS_DRUG_CST_AMT/100 AS CUR_MO_TOT_GROS_DRUG_CST_AMT, CUR_MO_LOW_INCM_CST_SHARING_AMT/100 AS CUR_MO_LOW_INCM_CST_SHARING_AMT, CUR_MO_COV_PLN_PD_AMT/100 AS CUR_MO_COV_PLN_PD_AMT, CUR_SUBMT_DUE_AMT/100 AS CUR_SUBMT_DUE_AMT, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_edw_staging}.PdeRecRptSubmtCntrCntrDtlFLoad_TMP_PdeRecRptSubmtCntrCntrDtlFLoad) MERGE @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_EDWOwner}.PDE_REC_RPT_SUBMT_CNTR_CNTR_DTL_F AS T USING cte AS S ON T.PDE_REC_RPT_SUBMT_CNTR_CNTR_DTL_SK = S.PDE_REC_RPT_SUBMT_CNTR_CNTR_DTL_SK WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET T.FILE_ID=S.FILE_ID, T.SUBMT_CNTR_SEQ_ID=S.SUBMT_CNTR_SEQ_ID, T.CNTR_SEQ_ID=S.CNTR_SEQ_ID, T.DTL_SEQ_ID=S.DTL_SEQ_ID, T.SRC_SYS_CD=S.SRC_SYS_CD, T.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK=S.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, T.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK=S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, T.PDE_REC_RPT_SUBMT_CNTR_CNTR_SK=S.PDE_REC_RPT_SUBMT_CNTR_CNTR_SK, T.SUBMT_CMS_CNTR_ID=S.SUBMT_CMS_CNTR_ID, T.CMS_CNTR_ID=S.CMS_CNTR_ID, T.CUR_MCARE_BNFCRY_ID=S.CUR_MCARE_BNFCRY_ID, T.LAST_SUBMT_MCARE_BNFCRY_ID=S.LAST_SUBMT_MCARE_BNFCRY_ID, T.LAST_SUBMT_CARDHLDR_ID=S.LAST_SUBMT_CARDHLDR_ID, T.DRUG_COV_STTUS_CD_TX=S.DRUG_COV_STTUS_CD_TX, T.CUR_MO_GROS_DRUG_CST_ABOVE_AMT=S.CUR_MO_GROS_DRUG_CST_ABOVE_AMT, T.CUR_MO_GROS_DRUG_CST_BELOW_AMT=S.CUR_MO_GROS_DRUG_CST_BELOW_AMT, T.CUR_MO_TOT_GROS_DRUG_CST_AMT=S.CUR_MO_TOT_GROS_DRUG_CST_AMT, T.CUR_MO_LOW_INCM_CST_SHARING_AMT=S.CUR_MO_LOW_INCM_CST_SHARING_AMT, T.CUR_MO_COV_PLN_PD_AMT=S.CUR_MO_COV_PLN_PD_AMT, T.CUR_SUBMT_DUE_AMT=S.CUR_SUBMT_DUE_AMT, T.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK=S.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, T.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK=S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (PDE_REC_RPT_SUBMT_CNTR_CNTR_DTL_SK, FILE_ID, SUBMT_CNTR_SEQ_ID, CNTR_SEQ_ID, DTL_SEQ_ID, SRC_SYS_CD, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, PDE_REC_RPT_SUBMT_CNTR_CNTR_SK, SUBMT_CMS_CNTR_ID, CMS_CNTR_ID, CUR_MCARE_BNFCRY_ID, LAST_SUBMT_MCARE_BNFCRY_ID, LAST_SUBMT_CARDHLDR_ID, DRUG_COV_STTUS_CD_TX, CUR_MO_GROS_DRUG_CST_ABOVE_AMT, CUR_MO_GROS_DRUG_CST_BELOW_AMT, CUR_MO_TOT_GROS_DRUG_CST_AMT, CUR_MO_LOW_INCM_CST_SHARING_AMT, CUR_MO_COV_PLN_PD_AMT, CUR_SUBMT_DUE_AMT, CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK) VALUES (S.PDE_REC_RPT_SUBMT_CNTR_CNTR_DTL_SK, S.FILE_ID, S.SUBMT_CNTR_SEQ_ID, S.CNTR_SEQ_ID, S.DTL_SEQ_ID, S.SRC_SYS_CD, S.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_DT_SK, S.PDE_REC_RPT_SUBMT_CNTR_CNTR_SK, S.SUBMT_CMS_CNTR_ID, S.CMS_CNTR_ID, S.CUR_MCARE_BNFCRY_ID, S.LAST_SUBMT_MCARE_BNFCRY_ID, S.LAST_SUBMT_CARDHLDR_ID, S.DRUG_COV_STTUS_CD_TX, S.CUR_MO_GROS_DRUG_CST_ABOVE_AMT, S.CUR_MO_GROS_DRUG_CST_BELOW_AMT, S.CUR_MO_TOT_GROS_DRUG_CST_AMT, S.CUR_MO_LOW_INCM_CST_SHARING_AMT, S.CUR_MO_COV_PLN_PD_AMT, S.CUR_SUBMT_DUE_AMT, S.CRT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK, S.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK)
